news-korea-econ.title: Exclusive: FBI Director Kash Patel Details Agency’s Violent Crime Crackdown, Fraud Fight
news-korea-econ.description:
FBI Director Kash Patel detailed the agency's victories cracking down on violent crime, as well as the Trump administration's aggressive pursuit of fraud, during an interview with Breitbart News Saturday.
